title: poa annua proles supina
intro: Poa annua proles supina, also known as annual bluegrass, is a subspecies of the annual grass Poa annua. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa annua proles supina include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and teas, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water.
